title: Lesson 51
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.example: The narrow street is hard for buses to use.
I feel nervous before a speech.

words.meaning: not closed or ready for people to enter
words.example: The shop is open until nine.

words.meaning: having a lot of money or full of something good
words.example: The rich soil is good for farming.

words.meaning: a little hot in a pleasant way
words.example: This warm soup is perfect for winter.

words.meaning: having a large distance from side to side
words.example: The wide road has space for bicycles.
We have a weekly meeting on Monday.

words.meaning: having four equal sides and four corners
words.example: Cut the paper into a square shape.
Are you sure this is the right train?

words.meaning: after the expected or usual time
words.example: The bus was late because of traffic.
